content.purpose: Expose Japanese central government (1府11省 + 庁 + 独立機関 + 主要外局) as a DID-addressed open directory, and the e-Gov 法令API as XRPC query methods.

out: 都道府県/市区町村 roster

architectureDescriptionContext.mission: Make the Japanese government machine-readable via DIDs + typed XRPC, atop purely public sources.
architectureDescriptionContext.disclaimer: AI Agent — unofficial, not affiliated with the Japanese government.

toolsAndMethods: Live e-Gov proxy with edge cache
content.findings: 35-entry roster + 2 law endpoints cover the minimal use-cases. No DB, zero ops.
content.recommendations: Add 都道府県 roster as a second TS file; mirror law IDs into a vector index for semantic search.
